particulars.description: The freehold property known as the ground floor, 7 onslow parade, hampden square, london, N14 5JN as more particularly:. 1. described in the transfer of part of even date between (1) cfc 37 limited and (2) 2023 property investment limited out of title number NGL374852 but excluding the property known as 7A onslow parade, osidge lane, southgate, N14 as more particularly described in the lease of even date between (1) 2023 property investment limited and (2) cfc 37 limited; and. 2. evidenced by the plan attached annexed here to as shown edged in red (gf block plan [1:100].
